title: matricaria inodora proles maritima
intro: Matricaria inodora proles maritima, also known as Sea Chamomile, is a perennial plant that is native to the coastal regions of Europe and Western Asia. It possesses anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are often used in herbal medicine to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Sea Chamomile include its ability to calm the mind and body, promote relaxation, and improve the quality of sleep. Sea Chamomile is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
